name: Library Management System
desc: It is a modern web-based application that digitizes traditional library operations. Built with the MERN stack, it provides a comprehensive platform for managing books, users, and borrowing records efficiently.

name: ShortiFy
desc: URL shortener application built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. This project allows users to generate shortened URLs that redirect to original links, similar to services like Bitly or TinyURL.

name: MyAuthApp
desc: Authentication System: Built a secure user authentication flow with registration, login, JWT-based sessions, email verification, and password reset using hashed tokens.

name: PokeCards
desc: A React web app that allows users to search for Pokémon by name and view their details, fetching data dynamically from a public Pokémon API.

name: MiniProjects
desc: A curated collection of interactive web tools built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, including a language translator, GitHub profile viewer, gradient generator, BMI calculator, and currency converter with live flags and exchange rates

name: AG BookStore
desc: AgBook Store is a fully JavaScript-based online bookstore that lets users explore, add to cart, purchase books, and manage their accounts with LocalStorage as the backend.

name: EveryDay Eats
desc: Discover delicious recipes with easy step-by-step instructions. Search, cook, and enjoy the best meals from around the world!

name: Language Tranlator
desc: A simple and efficient Language Translator web app that allows users to translate text between multiple languages. It supports speech recognition, text-to-speech, and real-time translation using API.
